data.title: Ancient Bitcoin Whale Comes Alive After Lying Low for Over 14 Years, Moves $469,811,057 in BTC at 30,00,000%+ Profit: On-Chain Data
data.description:
A Bitcoin (BTC) whale wallet has resumed activity after lying low for approximately 14 and a half years, according to on-chain data. According to blockchain tracking platform Lookonchain, the whale moved Bitcoin worth approximately $469. 8 million after being dormant since the last transaction was conducted on January 15th of 2011
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/07/25/ancient-bitcoin-whale-comes-alive-after-lying-low-for-over-14-years-moves-469811057-in-btc-at-3000000-profit-on-chain-data/

data.title: Fed chair Powell says he won’t resign or cut interest rates because of Trump
data.description:
Jerome Powell is staying exactly where he is, and he’s not cutting interest rates either. According to reporting from CNN, the Federal Reserve Chair told people close to him that he won’t give in to President Donald Trump’s repeated demands to either quit or cut rates. Powell, who was originally nominated by Trump in 2017, […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/powell-says-he-wont-resign-or-cut-rates/

data.title: Oil holds steady, dollar closes with a weekly loss amid sanctions and central bank decisions
data.description:
Oil prices ended the week almost flat after days of pressure from rising supply concerns and weak economic data out of the U. S. and China. On Friday, traders pulled back further as signs of slowing momentum grew louder. Brent crude dropped 74 cents, settling at $68. 44, while West Texas Intermediate (WTI) slipped 87 cents to […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/oil-holds-steady-dollar-with-a-weekly-loss/

data.title: Cathie Wood Doesn't Need Tesla To Win—ARKK Delivers A Blowout While EV Giant Idles
data.description:
During the pandemic-fueled boom of 2020, Cathie Wood's Ark Innovation ETF (NYSE:ARKK) was one of the hottest funds on Wall Street, surging nearly 400% off its March 2020 lows. But that euphoria peaked in February 2021.

data.title: Venmo and PayPal users can now donate to pay $36.7 trillion US debt
data.description:
The US Department of the Treasury is accepting donations from Americans who use Venmo and PayPal to reduce the $36. 7 trillion national debt. The new payment option was quietly added to the federal “Gifts to Reduce the Public Debt” program, an initiative that has existed since 1996. Users can now access Pay. gov and use the […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/venmo-and-paypal-users-pay-36-7trn-us-debt/

data.title: How to Connect Wallet to the Shiba Inu Ecosystem
data.description:
🎧 Listen to This Article Prefer to listen? Hit play below to hear the narrated version. The official hub for the Shiba Inu ecosystem, shib. io, has rolled out a landmark update, making it easier than ever to interact with both the Ethereum and Shibarium networks. With support for over 15 of the industry’s popular crypto wallets now live, the single point of connection removes previous technical barriers, creating a unified experience for all users
source: https://news.shib.io/2025/07/25/how-to-connect-wallet-to-the-shiba-inu-ecosystem/
